title: Korean-Style Provolone Pancakes
description: A gluten-free twist on traditional pancakes using provola cheese and a Korean-inspired flavor profile.

ingredients.name: Ravishing Pancake Mix (gluten-free)
ingredients.notes: Make sure to choose a gluten-free mix

ingredients.name: Provolone Cheese, shredded
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality, gluten-free provola cheese

ingredients.name: Green Onions, chopped
ingredients.notes: Add for extra flavor and texture

ingredients.name: Korean Chili Flakes (gochugaru)
ingredients.notes: Adjust to taste for heat level

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the pancake mix, eggs, and shredded cheese.
Add the chopped green onions and Korean chili flakes. Mix well until combined.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes hot with your favorite toppings, such as maple syrup or a fried egg.
